pages.title: Fresh Water
pages.text: Animals need water just as much as food. A $(l:ks_apocalypse:farming/water_trough)Water Trough$() holds up to 4000 mB of water. Animals will seek it out when thirsty.

pages.title: Crafting
pages.text: Fill it with a water bucket. It also refills slowly from rain if the sky is visible above it.

pages.title: Thirst
pages.text: Thirst works the same as hunger — it runs from 0 to 100 and decays over time. In $(9)summer$() thirst drains faster. In $(b)winter$() hunger drains faster instead. Keep both troughs stocked year-round.
